generate.prompt_template:
You are working in this repository. Based on the following requirements, generate an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) and a detailed implementation plan.

Requirements:
{context}

Output the ADR first, then the plan. Use markdown format.

review.prompt_template:
Review the following design documents. Check for completeness, correctness, and feasibility. Start your response with APPROVE or REJECT on the first line.

{artifact}

execute.prompt_template:
Implement the code according to the following plan. Read the plan carefully and implement all changes.

{artifact}

review.prompt_template:
Review the code changes in this repository. Check for correctness, code quality, and adherence to the plan. Start your response with APPROVE or REJECT on the first line.

{artifact}

Perform a final review of the entire implementation. Check that everything matches the original plan and ADR. Start your response with APPROVE or REJECT on the first line.

{artifact}
